meaning: n.伏都教(一种西非原始宗教),伏都教徒;adj.伏都教的;vt.施伏都巫术迷惑;一种图形加速芯片
examples: The founders of Voodoo Doughnuts never had a problem going against that grain.
Is City in a similar situation with Sir Alex sticking metaphorical pins in virtual voodoo dolls?
Moving beyond voodoo and trying to quantify intangibles can help in managing social responsibilities more strategically.
